FLOW.COMMENT: analyzeFtpCode - analyze an ftp message to determine if it is normal, transient or fatal

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_analyzeFtpCode - analyze an ftp message to determine if it is normal, transient or fatal
note that some error codes are overloaded with multiple messages, ie 421

BRANCH.COMMENT: note that the order of the following checks is important

SEQUENCE.NAME: code == 421 && msg == "You are not authorized to make the connection"
code == 550
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Requested action not taken. (ie file not found)

SEQUENCE.NAME: code == 552
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Requested file action aborted. Exceeded storage allocation (for current directory or dataset).
